title: Furniture and furnishings fire safety regulations
body: "This guidance will help businesses understand the Furniture and Furnishings (Fire) (Safety) (Amendment) Regulations 2025, which came into force on 30 October 2025, updating the Furniture and Furnishings (Fire) (Safety) Regulations 1988 to:   remove certain baby and young children’s products from scope of the regulations remove the requirement for manufacturers to affix a display label to new products extend the time frame for instituting legal proceedings from 6 – 12 months  "
